stemHtml: Which of the following statements regarding precipitation, turbulence and icing is correct when considering NS cloud?

options.a: Precipitation is frequently in the form of hail, icing is frequently severe and turbulence may range between light and severe.
options.b: Precipitation may be snow, ice pellets or rain, icing and turbulence are frequently severe.
options.c: Precipitation and icing are usually nil, turbulence is rarely more than moderate.
options.d: Precipitation may be snow, ice pellets or rain, icing is probable and may range between light and severe, turbulence is rarely more than moderate.
